name: ppg
description: PPG: A powerful app generator simplifying development with Python and PyQt/PySide.
long_description:
PPG (Python PyQt Generator) is a comprehensive tool designed to streamline the creation, packaging, and distribution of desktop applications using Python and PyQt/PySide. With a modern approach and a component-based architecture, PPG empowers developers to build modular and scalable applications efficiently, avoiding spaghetti code and enhancing project maintainability.

Inspired by React Class Components, PPG introduces a clear lifecycle for components, with dedicated methods for initialization, updates, and cleanup. This structure promotes an organized and predictable workflow, making it especially valuable for teams managing complex or large-scale applications.

Additionally, PPG includes Pydux, a state management system inspired by Redux, which simplifies application-wide state handling. Pydux offers a centralized and predictable data flow, enabling efficient state updates and making debugging easier through its intuitive design.

PPG also features an enhanced CLI that automates the creation of components and views, eliminating repetitive tasks and accelerating development time. Built on FBS, this generator introduces significant improvements such as optimized support for Qt bindings and a more refined project structure.

PPG was designed to be a powerful and accessible tool, ideal for both experienced developers and those new to desktop application development. By using PPG, you can focus on building robust and visually appealing applications while reducing the complexity of setup and state management.
author: Neuri
